name: Salamandra with Chain
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くさり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>付</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>飛龍炎刃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サラマンドラ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 FIRE monster on the field; equip this card to it as an Equip Card that gives it 700 ATK, then you can change 1 Effect Monster on the field to face-down Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 FIRE Warrior or Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck, but destroy it during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Salamandra with Chain" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 FIRE monster on the field; equip this card to it as an Equip Card that gives it 700 ATK, then you can change 1 Effect Monster on the field to face-down Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 FIRE Warrior or Dragon Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your hand, field, and/or GY into the Deck, but destroy it during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Salamandra with Chain" once per turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
